Repair Services

About

Local Tech.
No Markup.

Lindberg Tech Solutions is a mobile repair operation serving Preston and Monongalia County. No storefront overhead means you get fair prices and I come to you — at your home, your job, wherever is convenient.

I've been fixing electronics for over 10 years. Phones, laptops, PCs, consoles, retro hardware — if it runs on electricity, I've probably had it apart. I also hold an A.A.S. in Cybersecurity and Information Systems and I'm working toward CompTIA A+ and Security+ certifications.

I'm straightforward about what I can and can't fix before I take your money.

Mobile — We Come to You
No drop-off hassle. I come to your location in Preston or Monongalia County.
Honest Diagnosis First
I'll tell you what's wrong and what it'll cost before I touch anything.
IT & Cybersecurity Background
A.A.S. in Cybersecurity. Working toward CompTIA A+ and Security+.

FAQ

Common Questions

Not yet — Lindberg Tech Solutions is currently a mobile operation. I come to you at your home or workplace. A physical shop is in the plans down the road.
Primarily Preston County and Monongalia County, WV. If you're just outside that range, reach out — I may still be able to help depending on the job.
Call or text me with a description of the problem. I'll give you an honest estimate and let you know if I can fix it before we schedule anything.
Yes — legacy and retro devices are a specific service I offer. Old consoles, vintage PCs, older laptops. These often need recapping, belt replacement, or sourcing specific parts. Call and describe what you have.
Cash, Venmo, and CashApp. Additional methods may be added — ask when booking.
